creator: nxjoseph@protonmail.com
text: I talked with the maintainer of ytdownloader and he said that he has no plans upgrading it to electron32 because many things has been removed in v32 which is a thing he didn't like. YTDownloader now doeesn't work with 32, it directly dumps a core file, so, I think i should close this port request until it becomes usable.
